creator: doctor@doctor.nl2k.ab.ca
text:
uname -a 

FreeBSD border.nk.ca 12.0-RELEASE-p8 FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p8 GENERIC  amd64

/etc/make.conf


less /etc/make.conf
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=linux=c7_64
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ruby=2.5
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=python=3.6
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=bdb=5.3
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=lua=5.3
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=perl5=5.28
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=openssl=base
HAVE_MOTIF=yes
CC=/usr/local/bin/clang80
CXX=/usr/local/bin/clang++80
CPP=/usr/local/bin/clang-cpp80
MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=1

hold on for the other 2
